title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 9.5%.

items.title:
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: Burnham kept telling MPs to keep the faith. But the search kept having setbacks. Until Simons agreed - because Makerfield is exactly the place to prove what Burnham needs to prove.
